category_sources: source_facts.description says pybind11 provides seamless operability between C++11 and Python; official docs describe C++/Python bindings.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name gives pybind11; official documentation and repository use pybind11.
docs_sources: Official pybind11 documentation is hosted at pybind11.readthedocs.io and links to the GitHub source.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/pybind/pybind11, so repo is returned as null per instructions.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official docs identify C++11/Python interoperability and binding-library use.
